user.title: Add a SmartMat
user.description: Pick one of the {count} available SmartMat weight sensors. Already-configured mats are hidden.

error.not_a_smartmat: That entity is not a sensor.smartmat_*_weight sensor.

abort.no_weight_sensors: No sensor.smartmat_*_weight sensors found. Make sure the rescue server is running and MQTT discovery has fired, or every available mat is already configured.

init.title: SmartMat Dashboard
init.description: No options — edit product / tare / full via the entity cards.
